Highlights

  • Top contributor: unassigned with 21 tickets
  • Total tickets closed: 26
  • Total tickets moved to QA: 18
  • Engineers active this week: 10

Details

unassigned

  • #10645 — Campaign Update (Closed)
  • #11143 — Fix: Stop all Nexxen Ads when deleting AdGroupCreative with multiple medias (Closed)
  • #10642 — [Bug] Verifying Tag Domain triggers other input field errors (Closed)
  • #10447 — [Bug] User gets logged out when moving org with lesser permission (Closed)
  • #10646 — Accurate reporting and pacing calculations (Closed)
  • #11089 — Update Campaign Testing (Closed)
  • #7380 — Fix CPMList upsert error when IDs are null in updateParentOrg (Closed)
  • #11224 — [Bug] A specific tag is redirecting users to white screen (Closed)
  • #2132 — Fix: IO and Package name not updated when campaign name changes (Closed)
  • #11263 — [Bug] White screen occurs after changing user password (Closed)
  • #11265 — [Bug] User unable to logout when no avatar is set (Closed)
  • #11267 — [Bug] Dojo webapp server restarts when someone changes password (Closed)
  • #11268 — Homepage RollUp shows non-zero impressions/revenue for orgs with no live or in-attribution campaigns (Closed)
  • #7033 — Multi-Flight Schedule Support at Campaign Level (Nexxen IO Schedules) (QA)
  • #10627 — [Enhancement] Order Queue > Queued Stage | For Delivery Button (QA)
  • #10754 — Proposal - QAJel (QA)
  • #11175 — Remove Past Month Filter from Campaign Table (QA)
  • #11190 — [Bug] GraphQL AttributionMethodCommerce validation error on campaign transaction upsert (QA)
  • #11241 — Add "Prospecting" Org Type (QA)
  • #11240 — Add "Channel Partner Direct" Org Type (QA)
  • #11307 — Hotfix Tag table issues (QA)

  • #11376 — NexTek, SRS Distribution preview: app crashes after accessing Library (Closed)
  • #11225 — [Bug] Unable to select any location from dropdown (Closed)
  • #11327 — [Bug] No data in creatives when searching from the last pagination (Closed)
  • #11364 — Dashboard Dark Mode (QA)
  • #11341 — [Bug] Error 404 when creating location in Prodstage (QA)
  • #11379 — Deprecated heatmap (QA)

icarlofer

  • #11360 — Paid Search data stops at May 7 on dashboard (Closed)
  • #10864 — Refactor Display Campaign Pipeline to use the Data in Clickhouse (Closed)
  • #11361 — Paid Search dashboard: white screen when accessing empty Paid Search (TypeError reading 'xAxis') (Closed)
  • #11129 — [Enhancement] Clear button should reset the filters without needing to click Apply (QA)

ramzell

  • #11223 — [Bug] Team member and Owner dropdown filter does not display the Selected filters (Closed)
  • #11206 — [Bug] Task History tab shows 0 and only updates upon clicking (Closed)
  • #10006 — PCL | Campaign requester load data on demand (Closed)
  • #11325 — [Bug] Page flickers after clicking task link (QA)

Period: 2026-05-11 → 2026-05-17

Highlights

  • randallegend and ramzell tied for the lead with 3 tickets each — randallegend drove fixes across the dashboard and GQL service, while ramzell shipped three enhancements.
  • elmobunani21 advanced both the K8s cluster migration (closed) and the CI/GitOps refactor (moved to QA).
  • #1640 Q4 GOALS: Data Factory Service was a collaborative close shared by four engineers: martin0x, verdelmediajel, ZeeLiger, and JC-DMZ22.
  • 8 issues closed and 3 issues moved to QA across 8 engineers this week.

Details

randallegend

  • [Bug] Invalid date under Start and End Time for publisher — closed 2026-05-14
  • Orphan Issue + Partial Upsert of Publisher Transaction — closed 2026-05-14
  • No spend reported for Auction Plus (campaignOrder.pricingModel) campai — moved to QA 2026-05-13

ramzell

  • [Enhancement] Task File Upload - Increase the 2MB Cap — closed 2026-05-14
  • [Bug] Task History tab shows 0 and only updates upon clicking — closed 2026-05-14
  • [Enhancement] Adjust for readability of task status — closed 2026-05-14

elmobunani21

  • Move Non-Critical apps to Deploy on a new staging K8s Cluster — closed 2026-05-11
  • Refactor CI workflows for microservices to adopt GitOps workflow and r — moved to QA 2026-05-13

martin0x

  • Q4 GOALS: Data Factory Service — closed 2026-05-14

verdelmediajel

  • Q4 GOALS: Data Factory Service — closed 2026-05-14

ZeeLiger

  • Q4 GOALS: Data Factory Service — closed 2026-05-14

Achievements Wall

Team wins, milestones, and highlights

Latest 2026-W21

Achievements — 2026-W21

Achievements — 2026-W21

Period: 2026-05-18 → 2026-05-24

This week we shipped

Features

  • Slice #1 MVP end-to-end — First complete product feature delivered from definition to production (MED-46)
  • Budget Tracker visual polish — Refined UI/UX across the Budget Tracker module, with a full QA pass confirming correctness (MED-32, MED-33)
  • Opportunity Details Page beautification — Enhanced visual design and improved the Salesforce integration tab UX on the Opportunity page (MED-120, MED-121, MED-122, MED-134)

Bug Fixes

  • Tag Domain validation regression — Fixed input field errors erroneously triggered when verifying a Tag Domain; full plan, implementation, code review, and QA cycle completed in-week (MED-89, MED-90, MED-92, MED-93, MED-94)

Infrastructure & Automation

  • Relations reporting pipeline — Bootstrapped the med-relations repo and launched three automated weekly agents: DevPerformanceAgent, AchievementsAgent, and ReleaseNotesAgent — delivering automated team metrics from day one (MED-123, MED-125, MED-126, MED-128)
  • GitHub integration wired — Enabled agentic read/write of repo state across mediajel-gql-service, mediajel-dashboard, and amplication-nestjs-microservices (MED-24)
  • Engineering process established — Defined development workflow, hired first engineer, and established hiring plan (MED-1, MED-82)

By the numbers

  • 123 tickets closed
  • 99 PRs merged
  • 11 contributors active

Release Notes

Full versioned changelog, newest first

v1.0.0 Latest

Release Notes — v1.0.0

Deployed: 2026-05-22T20:07:25Z
Environment: production
PR: #11397

Production deployment — hotfix restructure + staging validation

What's new

Bug fixes

  • Restructure task management route to avoid flickering — The Task Management section flickered on every page refresh across board, project details, and task detail views. Root cause: React Router was unmounting and remounting the /tasks route due to an unstable reference. Fixed by wrapping the route component in useCallback keyed on currentUser, making the route reference stable and preventing needless remounts. (#11395, MD-11325)

Chores / maintenance

  • Merge master into production-stage (#11396)

Commits included

SHA Message
a7563a5f MD-#11325 Restructure task management route to avoid flickering
875b3824 Merge pull request #11395 from MediaJel/MD-##11325-reopen
b6787223 Merge pull request #11396 from MediaJel/master

Generated by ReleaseNotesAgent on 2026-05-23T03:22:00Z

v0.1.0

Release Notes — v0.1.0

Deployed: 2026-05-23T09:00:00Z Environment: production PR: #1

Initial release of the MED Relations pipeline system.

What's new

Features

  • MED-123 — Relations — Team productivity reporting system
  • MED-125 — Relations: Phase 1 — Infra setup (GitHub repo, Pages pipeline)
  • MED-131 — Relations: Phase 2 — DevPerformanceAgent, AchievementsAgent & ReleaseNotesAgent

Generated by ReleaseNotesAgent
